title: agent:ready event payload
description: Emitted by the hub to the agent after the handshake is complete and the agent is authorised to start processing RPC requests.

agent_id.description: Canonical agent identifier confirmed by the hub.

protocol_version.description: Negotiated protocol version in use for this session (e.g. '2.6').

session_id.description: Optional opaque session identifier assigned by the hub for this connection.

transport_limits.description: Negotiated transport limits for this session. Mirrors TransportLimits from agent:capabilities.

streaming_row_threshold.description: Row count above which the agent switches to streaming.

streaming_chunk_size.description: Number of rows per streaming chunk.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the hub emitted this event.
